name: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc.
description: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. is a global leader in smart energy technology, specializing in the development of inverter solutions that changed the way power is harvested and managed in photovoltaic (PV) systems. The company's intelligent inverter solution maximizes power generation while lowering the cost of energy produced by the PV system. SolarEdge addresses a broad range of energy market segments through its diversified product offering, including residential, commercial, and large-scale PV, energy storage and backup solutions, electric vehicle charging, and grid services. Founded in 2006, the company is headquartered in Israel and incorporated in Delaware, providing innovative energy solutions worldwide.
